use_cases: Trigger form submissions and actions in web applications
Navigate between pages or sections when used with routing
Provide accessible interactive buttons with keyboard navigation support
Support multiple visual variants for different contextual actions (primary, destructive, secondary)
ai_summary: A reusable Radix UI-based Button component with CVA (class-variance-authority) for managing multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Supports asChild prop for composition with Radix Slot, includes focus-visible styling for accessibility, and uses Tailwind CSS for styling with ring-offset-background theming system.
